message:
fix: propagate errors from index cleanup, idempotency storage, and negative timestamps

- remove_dir_all: propagate non-NotFound errors instead of silently
  ignoring, preventing stale index files from contaminating rebuilds
- Negative timestamps: return None from staleness calculation when
  ts <= 0 (corrupt data) instead of coercing to 0 and reporting
  artificially huge staleness
- Idempotency key storage: log warnings on table creation, expired
  key cleanup, and key insertion failures instead of silently
  discarding errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
